name: Fighting — lateral brawler
description: Side-view fighter (the c44763af sign-error class): D moves +x, A moves -x, attack lowers opponent HP.
brief: Build a 2D one-on-one fighting game viewed from the side. Pressing D moves the player to the right (increasing x), A moves left (decreasing x), and the attack key (J) throws a punch that lowers the opponent's health when in range. Reducing the opponent's health to zero wins the round; losing all your own health loses it.
